description:
Scan the boarding pass QR code using bcWebCam to capture the raw IATA BCBP string. The QR code image has been downloaded to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\boarding_pass_qr.png and is opened on your screen (or visible to the virtual camera). 

Extract 7 specific flight details using exact Python-style string slicing on the raw string:
- `[2:22]` : Passenger Name
- `[23:30]` : PNR
- `[30:33]` : Origin
- `[33:36]` : Destination
- `[36:39]` : Carrier Code
- `[39:44]` : Flight Number
- `[48:52]` : Seat Number

Trim any leading or trailing whitespace from the extracted values.
Save the extracted data as a JSON file at `C:\Users\Docker\Documents\claim_data.json` using the exact keys: `"name"`, `"pnr"`, `"origin"`, `"destination"`, `"carrier"`, `"flight"`, `"seat"`.
